name: Isabella Munoz-Chavarria
ai_summary: Isabella Munoz-Chavarria has extensive childcare experience since age 15 and creates safe, fun environments where kids can grow. Located in Atlanta with part-time availability, she handles conflicts calmly by listening to all sides and guiding children toward positive behavior and problem-solving.

transcripts.q3: My name is Isabella and I have experience caring for children from newborns at age 15. I enjoy working with kids because I love supporting their growth. Helping them build companies and creating a safe, fun and caring environment.
transcripts.q4: I am located in Atlanta, Georgia for County area and I'm willing to travel with the 10-mile range.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for a part-time job and my ability is any day.
transcripts.q6: Stay calm in neutral. They each each child, explain their side and acknowledge different things. Focus on solving the problem instead of playing me goddamn to find a fair solution and reinforce good behavior while applying consistent Houston consequences if needed.
transcripts.q7: I would be a good teacher because I can stay come handle conflicts, fairly listen to kids and have them towards positive behavior and problem solving,
